decision_summary: v7.1 Context and Reference Integrity design is approved as the next bounded roadmap step after v7.0.0.
rationale: The design reuses existing context-pack, external-ref, work-governance, session observability, and Mission Control surfaces instead of inventing a broad research verifier. It defines a bounded claim, artifacts, audit command, negative coverage, Council gate, release gates, and explicit semantic-truth boundary.
recommendation: Proceed to TASK-090 through TASK-094 in order: contract, writers, audit, Mission Control projection, release integration.
expected_user_reaction: Understand what v7.1 will prove, what it will not prove, and why implementation should be split into small runtime-backed tasks.
artifact_change_recommendations: Add context/reference integrity schemas, writer commands, audit command, Mission Control projection, and release docs in separate tasks.
organization_change_recommendations: Require Council-visible context/reference integrity evidence before approving implementation-grade work or release sign-off.
human_override_signal: User asked to advance the roadmap but design first.
